# Journify Frontend

AI-Enhanced Personal Diary for Mental Health — Frontend

This repository contains the frontend of the *AI-Enhanced Personal Diary for Mental Health* project, built with ReactJS and MaterializeCSS. It communicates with the Django backend using custom API calls and provides a clean interface for writing diary entries, viewing analysis, and managing subscriptions.

---

## Features

### Diary Entry Interface

* Create diary entries with title and content
* Display emotion analysis (top 5 emotion percentages)
* View personalized recommendations generated by the backend

### Authentication UI

* Signup and login screens
* Uses JWT returned from the backend
* Token stored in `localStorage`

### Stripe Payment UI

* Dedicated payment page
* Axios requests include JWT token in the `Authorization` header
* Redirects users to the Stripe Checkout session

### MaterializeCSS-Based UI

* Clean and responsive interface
* Forms, buttons, and layouts styled using MaterializeCSS

---

## Tech Stack

### Frontend

* ReactJS
* MaterializeCSS
* Axios
* React Router
* LocalStorage (JWT handling)

---

## Project Structure

```
journify-frontend/
│
├── src/
│   ├── components/        # Reusable UI components
│   ├── pages/             # Screens including Login, Register, Dashboard, Payment
│   ├── api/               # Axios instances and API utilities
│   └── App.jsx            # Main application file
│
└── public/
```

---

## How to Run the Frontend

### 1. Clone the Repository

```
git clone <repo-url>
cd journify-frontend
```

### 2. Install Dependencies

```
npm install
```

### 3. Start the Development Server

```
npm run dev
```

Frontend will be available at:
`http://localhost:5173/`

---

## Backend Integration Notes

* Backend URL: `http://127.0.0.1:8000/`
* Diary entry creation triggers automatic emotion analysis
* Stripe payment API calls require the following header:

  ```
  Authorization: Bearer <JWT access token>
  ```
